title: Custom-Death-messages
description: Add a personal touch to your server's kill messages with Custom Kill Messages!
body:
# Key features:
![Default kill message structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb49a75590bd37865e1044ab0ef3fd374bae5968.png)

- **Customizable Messages**:Players tweak the "custom message" part in the format "VictimName was (custom message) by KillerName using [item]" and there is a second optional format which is "KillerName (custom message) VictimName using [item]".
![Optional kill message structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/180827f4fefa5d4c34ce694805ec7a004169d681.png)

- **Color Customization**: Personalize colors for each part of the kill messages in config.
- **Permission Restriction**: Optionally limit command use to players with "_customKillmessage.use_" permission.
- **Easy Configuration**: Effortlessly change settings and colors in "config.yml."
- **GUI**:
  if you want to limit the kill messages your players can set,you can turn gui on through the config.this makes it so that they can only use a kill message from the options you have added in the gui(this is turned on by default)
![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e34b34007d43dd450873bc125cf43bc54955655.png)

# Info and instructions:

## Instructions:
Use "/setkillmessage <KillMessage>"
or if the gui is turned on in the config you can use "_/setkillmessage_" to set your custom message through the gui.
for viewing all the commands and permissions you can use _/cm help_(added in 2.0 update)


## Tested versions:
I have only tested it in 1.20 but it will probably work in older versions too and if there are any issues let me know here
[https://discord.com/invite/ExhzK6Js](https://discord.com/invite/ExhzK6Js)


**Tips**:
